ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-16-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S) ALL INTERNATIONAL CAR RENTAL. THE SEP-06-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
